description: HASS capability progression map — Skills, Foundation to Year 6. Organised by shared HASS skill strands for visualisation.
subject: HASS

standards.title: Pose questions about familiar worlds
standards.description: pose questions about familiar objects, people, places and events
standards.capability_goal: Students pose questions about familiar objects, people, places and events.

standards.title: Sort and record information
standards.description: sort and record information including pictorial timelines and locations on pictorial maps or models
standards.capability_goal: Students sort and record information including pictorial timelines and locations on pictorial maps or models.

standards.title: Share perspectives
standards.description: share a perspective on information, such as stories about significant events and special places
standards.capability_goal: Students share a perspective on information, such as stories about significant events and special places.

standards.title: Draw simple conclusions
standards.description: draw conclusions in response to questions
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions in response to questions.

standards.title: Share narratives and observations
standards.description: share narratives and observations, using sources and terms about the past and places
standards.capability_goal: Students share narratives and observations, using sources and terms about the past and places.

standards.title: Develop questions about past and present
standards.description: develop questions about objects, people, places and events in the past and present
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions about objects, people, places and events in the past and present.

standards.title: Collect and record information
standards.description: collect, sort and record information and data from observations and from provided sources, including unscaled timelines and labelled maps or models
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, sort and record information and data from observations and provided sources, including unscaled timelines and labelled maps or models.

standards.title: Interpret observations and comparisons
standards.description: interpret information and data from observations and provided sources, including the comparison of objects from the past and present
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data from observations and provided sources, including comparisons of objects from the past and present.

standards.title: Discuss perspectives
standards.description: discuss perspectives related to objects, people, places and events
standards.capability_goal: Students discuss perspectives related to objects, people, places and events.

standards.title: Draw conclusions and make proposals
standards.description: draw conclusions and make proposals
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions and make proposals.

standards.title: Develop narratives and observations
standards.description: develop narratives and share observations, using sources, and subject-specific terms
standards.capability_goal: Students develop narratives and share observations, using sources and subject-specific terms.

standards.title: Develop inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions about objects, people, places and events in the past and present
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions about objects, people, places and events in the past and present.

standards.title: Collect and organise observations
standards.description: collect, sort and record information and data from observations and from provided sources, including unscaled timelines and labelled maps or models
standards.capability_goal: Students collect, sort and record information and data from observations and provided sources, including unscaled timelines and labelled maps or models.

standards.title: Interpret information from sources
standards.description: interpret information and data from observations and provided sources, including the comparison of objects from the past and present
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data from observations and provided sources, including comparisons of objects from the past and present.

standards.title: Discuss different perspectives
standards.description: discuss perspectives related to objects, people, places and events
standards.capability_goal: Students discuss perspectives related to objects, people, places and events.

standards.title: Draw conclusions and proposals
standards.description: draw conclusions and make proposals
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions and make proposals.

standards.title: Share narratives using terms
standards.description: develop narratives and share observations, using sources, and subject-specific terms
standards.capability_goal: Students develop narratives and share observations, using sources and subject-specific terms.

standards.title: Develop investigation questions
standards.description: develop questions to guide investigations about people, events, places and issues
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to guide investigations about people, events, places and issues.

standards.title: Locate and record source information
standards.description: locate, collect and record information and data from a range of sources, including annotated timelines and maps
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, collect and record information and data from a range of sources, including annotated timelines and maps.

standards.title: Interpret information formats
standards.description: interpret information and data displayed in different formats
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data displayed in different formats.

standards.title: Analyse perspectives
standards.description: analyse information and data, and identify perspectives
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse information and data, and identify perspectives.

standards.title: Draw conclusions from analysis
standards.description: draw conclusions based on analysis of information
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions based on analysis of information.

standards.title: Propose actions with effects
standards.description: propose actions or responses to an issue or challenge that consider possible effects of actions
standards.capability_goal: Students propose actions or responses to an issue or challenge that consider possible effects of actions.

standards.title: Present descriptions and explanations
standards.description: present descriptions and explanations, using ideas from sources and relevant subject-specific terms
standards.capability_goal: Students present descriptions and explanations, using ideas from sources and relevant subject-specific terms.

standards.title: Develop guided investigation questions
standards.description: develop questions to guide investigations about people, events, places and issues
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to guide investigations about people, events, places and issues.

standards.title: Collect information from source ranges
standards.description: locate, collect and record information and data from a range of sources, including annotated timelines and maps
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, collect and record information and data from a range of sources, including annotated timelines and maps.

standards.title: Interpret information displays
standards.description: interpret information and data displayed in different formats
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data displayed in different formats.

standards.title: Analyse data and perspectives
standards.description: analyse information and data, and identify perspectives
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse information and data, and identify perspectives.

standards.title: Conclude from analysis
standards.description: draw conclusions based on analysis of information
standards.capability_goal: Students draw conclusions based on analysis of information.

standards.title: Propose responses with effects
standards.description: propose actions or responses to an issue or challenge that consider possible effects of actions
standards.capability_goal: Students propose actions or responses to an issue or challenge that consider possible effects of actions.

standards.title: Present sourced explanations
standards.description: present descriptions and explanations, using ideas from sources and relevant subject-specific terms
standards.capability_goal: Students present descriptions and explanations, using ideas from sources and relevant subject-specific terms.

standards.title: Develop system investigation questions
standards.description: develop questions to investigate people, events, developments, places and systems
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to investigate people, events, developments, places and systems.

standards.title: Organise primary and secondary sources
standards.description: locate, collect and organise information and data from primary and secondary sources in a range of formats
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, collect and organise information and data from primary and secondary sources in a range of formats.

standards.title: Evaluate patterns and trends
standards.description: evaluate information and data in a range of formats to identify and describe patterns and trends, or to infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate information and data in a range of formats to identify and describe patterns and trends, or to infer relationships.

standards.title: Evaluate source purpose and perspective
standards.description: evaluate primary and secondary sources to determine origin, purpose and perspectives
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate primary and secondary sources to determine origin, purpose and perspectives.

standards.title: Develop evidence-based conclusions
standards.description: develop evidence-based conclusions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop evidence-based conclusions.

standards.title: Assess effects using criteria
standards.description: propose actions or responses to issues or challenges and use criteria to assess the possible effects
standards.capability_goal: Students propose actions or responses to issues or challenges and use criteria to assess the possible effects.

standards.title: Present findings and viewpoints
standards.description: present descriptions and explanations, drawing ideas, findings and viewpoints from sources, and using relevant terms and conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students present descriptions and explanations, drawing ideas, findings and viewpoints from sources, and using relevant terms and conventions.

standards.title: Develop questions about systems
standards.description: develop questions to investigate people, events, developments, places and systems
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to investigate people, events, developments, places and systems.

standards.title: Organise information and data
standards.description: locate, collect and organise information and data from primary and secondary sources in a range of formats
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, collect and organise information and data from primary and secondary sources in a range of formats.

standards.title: Identify patterns and relationships
standards.description: evaluate information and data in a range of formats to identify and describe patterns and trends, or to infer relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate information and data in a range of formats to identify and describe patterns and trends, or to infer relationships.

standards.title: Evaluate sources and perspectives
standards.description: evaluate primary and secondary sources to determine origin, purpose and perspectives
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate primary and secondary sources to determine origin, purpose and perspectives.

standards.title: Develop evidence-based conclusions
standards.description: develop evidence-based conclusions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop evidence-based conclusions.

standards.title: Assess possible effects
standards.description: propose actions or responses to issues or challenges and use criteria to assess the possible effects
standards.capability_goal: Students propose actions or responses to issues or challenges and use criteria to assess the possible effects.

standards.title: Communicate findings and viewpoints
standards.description: present descriptions and explanations, drawing ideas, findings and viewpoints from sources, and using relevant terms and conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students present descriptions and explanations, drawing ideas, findings and viewpoints from sources, and using relevant terms and conventions.

capability_threads.description: Capability maturation sequences for HASS skills from Foundation to Year 6.
